title: wasm client.rs: PoW limitation not documented — deployer enabling PoW will silently break all WASM clients
description: wasm/src/client.rs NieRelayClient::connect() has no documentation mentioning that PoW-enabled relays are not supported. The relay README and DESIGN.md describe PoW as an optional feature. A deployer who enables POW_DIFFICULTY will unknowingly break all browser clients (WASM). There is no error in the relay logs indicating the WASM client failed due to PoW — only the client side gets a POW_REQUIRED error, and the WASM connect() returns Err(String) which is typically shown to the user as a generic connection error. The function-level doc on connect() should state: 'Note: PoW-enabled relays (difficulty > 0) are not supported; the WASM client will fail to authenticate'.
